Key Observations

  • Observation There are 65,859 observed BIN-Channel pairs across 1,771,026 transactions.
  • Observation The top pair is 403153 | SKYDOOR28 with 25,671 rows, representing 1.45% of the dataset.
  • Observation The distribution is very long-tailed: 21,490 pairs occur only once, and 48,838 pairs (74.16%) have 10 rows or fewer.
  • Observation The head still matters operationally: the top 10 pairs account for 6.88% of all rows, and the top 100 pairs account for 22.26%.
  • Observation This suggests later fraud and approval comparisons should use volume filters, because many BIN-Channel pairs have very little data.
